Section.name: UNCLASSIFIED
Section.Content: My Experience – My Digital Wellbeing Standard Service Description Prepared for: [Company] Prepared by: Vincent Vandersmissen Date: 28/03/2025 Cegeka reference: [Reference] CONFIDENTIAL Table of Contents 11 Standard Service Description 3 11.1 Introduction 3 11.2 What is the added business value? 4 11.2.1 Enhanced employee productivity 4 11.2.2 Increased Employee Wellbeing and Engagement 4 11.2.3 Improved Organizational Culture and Reputation 4 11.2.4 Enhanced Leadership Performance and Decision-Making 5 11.3 What is included in the service? 5 11.3.1 Standard Services 6 11.3.2 Optional Services 10 11.3.3 Responsibility matrix 11 11.4 SKU overview 13 11.4.1 Service SKUs 13 11.4.2 Standard changes SKUs 14 11.4.3 Non-standard changes SKUs 15 11.5 Service Level Agreement 17 11.5.1 Service Window 17 11.5.2 Specific Service Levels 17 11.6 Conditions 18 11.7 Out of scope 18 11.8 Cross-functional services 18

Section.name: Introduction
Section.Content: Our Digital Wellbeing service is designed to enhance the employee experience within your organization by leveraging data-driven insights and actionable recommendations. By implementing this service, you can drive business success, increase employee engagement, enhance productivity, and improve overall digital wellbeing. Through the use of Insights, we provide managers and leaders with visibility into team dynamics, enabling them to foster a sense of belonging, encourage effective communication, and create a positive work environment. This increased engagement leads to improved employee satisfaction and higher productivity levels. With our service we analyse work patterns and offer personalized recommendations for time management, focused work, and learning opportunities. By optimizing productivity, employees can work more efficiently and effectively, leading to enhanced output and business performance. In addition to the overall benefits of our Digital Wellbeing service, we focus on three key pillars to further enhance the employee experience within your organization: By aligning our Digital Wellbeing service with these three focus areas - individual happiness, (hybrid) teamwork & remote habits, and (digital) leadership - we enable organizations to create a holistic and thriving work environment. This, in turn, drives employee engagement, boosts productivity, and ultimately contributes to the overall success of the business.

Section.name: What is the added business value?
Section.Header: What is the added business value?
Section.Content: Our Digital Wellbeing service offers significant added business value by aligning with our three key focus areas, ultimately contributing to the holistic improvement of the employee experience within your organization.

Section.name: Enhanced employee productivity
Section.Content: By nurturing digital wellbeing, employees can experience an increase in their productivity, leading to a more harmonious work-life balance and a decrease in burnout. Insights provide valuable data on employee work patterns, collaboration trends, and focus time, allowing your organization to identify areas where employees may be facing challenges or excessive workloads. By providing training and guidance based on these insights, Cegeka can assist employees in optimizing their work habits, prioritizing tasks, and achieving a healthy work-life integration, resulting in increased productivity and efficiency within the organization.

Section.name: Increased Employee Wellbeing and Engagement
Section.Content: Prioritizing digital wellbeing demonstrates a commitment towards employees' mental health and overall wellbeing. When employees feel supported and cared for, they are more likely to be engaged, motivated, and satisfied with their work. Insights can provide personalized recommendations to help employees establish healthy work habits, take breaks, and maintain a healthy work-life balance. By providing guidance based on individual needs, your organization can foster a positive work environment, leading to higher levels of employee engagement and satisfaction. This, in turn, can result in reduced turnover rates and increased employee retention.

Section.name: Improved organizational Culture and Reputation
Section.Content: A focus on digital wellbeing contributes to the development of a positive organizational culture. When companies prioritize their employees' wellbeing, it fosters a sense of trust, support, and mutual respect within teams. By leveraging insights to identify potential sources of stress or inefficiency, organizations can proactively address these issues and create a healthier work environment. This commitment to digital wellbeing can also enhance your company’s employer branding by attracting top talent who value work-life balance and wellbeing. A positive organizational culture and a strong employer brand can lead to increased employee loyalty, positive word-of-mouth, and a competitive advantage in the job market. Enhanced Leadership Performance and Decision-Making Digital wellbeing is not only beneficial for employees, but also for leaders who face increased demands and responsibilities in a digital age. By utilizing Insights to optimize digital habits, leaders can help improve productivity, focus, and creativity which are essential skills for effective leadership. Moreover leaders can set an example for their teams and inspire them to create a positive feedback loop that enhances the wellbeing of the entire organization. Additionally, by gaining access to data-driven insights on the digital wellbeing of their teams, leaders can make more informed decisions that support their employees' needs and preferences, leading to improved team performance, collaboration, and satisfaction. Therefore, digital wellbeing can be a powerful tool for leaders to enhance their own capabilities and empower their teams, resulting in better outcomes for the organization as a whole.

Section.name: Enhanced Leadership Performance and Decision-Making
Section.Content: Digital wellbeing is not only beneficial for employees but also for leaders who face increased demands and responsibilities in a digital age. By utilizing insights to optimize digital habits, leaders can help improve productivity, focus, and creativity, which are essential skills for effective leadership. Moreover, leaders can set an example for their teams and inspire them to create a positive feedback loop that enhances the wellbeing of the entire organization. Additionally, by gaining access to data-driven insights on the digital wellbeing of their teams, leaders can make more informed decisions that support their employees' needs and preferences, leading to improved team performance, collaboration, and satisfaction. Therefore, digital wellbeing can be a powerful tool for leaders to enhance their own capabilities and empower their teams, resulting in better outcomes for the organization as a whole.

Section.name: What is included in the service?
Section.Header: What is included in the service?
Section.Content: We highly value the significance of digital wellbeing and understand its impact on individuals and organizations. However, we adopt a customer-centric approach that acknowledges the diverse needs and preferences of each customer. Therefore, we do not offer recurring services by default, as we believe that the services should be tailored to the unique requirements of each customer. This approach allows us to better understand and address specific challenges and goals, ensuring that our services are aligned with the individual needs of our customers and promoting a more personalized and effective approach to digital wellbeing.

Section.name: Standard Services
Section.Content: In today's dynamic and ever-changing business landscape, the Digital wellbeing and productivity of your workforce are fundamental to success. With reporting we can provide you with valuable data-driven insights that can help your organization navigate the complexities of the modern workplace related to wellbeing and productivity. As businesses adapt to hybrid work models understanding key metrics become essential. This service offers a comprehensive suite of metrics and analytics, allowing you to gain further insights into various aspects of your organization's productivity and wellbeing. From assessing business resilience to understanding the impact of different actions on employee productivity, our service offers a holistic view of your organization's performance. By examining meeting effectiveness, manager effectiveness, and more, you can identify areas for improvement and make informed decisions to foster a healthier work environment. These data driven reports based on your organisations data will allow you to make informed decisions instead of using general statistics. Important to know is the fact that privacy is guaranteed and inherent part of the set up of the employee experience platform and all the reports created by the platform. The scope of the reporting service contains following elements: The outcome of this report provides valuable insights into the productivity and wellbeing of your organization's workforce: Overall, the outcome of this report is a comprehensive understanding of your organization's strengths and opportunities in terms of digital wellbeing and productivity. Recurring options: In today's fast-paced and digitally-driven work environment, the wellbeing of your workforce is very important. Our Digital Wellbeing Pulse assessments are designed to provide your organization with valuable insights into the digital wellbeing based on the feedback of your employees. This service helps you understand how digital tools and work habits impact the overall health and happiness of your workforce. The scope of this pulse contains following topics: The outcome of the Digital Wellbeing Pulse Assessment provides valuable insights into the digital wellbeing of your employees. The assessment collects data on digital behaviours, work habits, and wellbeing indicators, and calculates a Digital Wellbeing Index to provide an overall measure of how digital technologies are affecting your workforce's wellbeing. Based on the assessment results we can offer workshops and training sessions to promote healthier digital habits and work-life balance. These initiatives can help improve employee satisfaction, productivity, and overall health and happiness. It is the unique combination of factual data-driven reports from your organisation and the insights from the employees which will allow you to take actions based on facts instead of assumption. Our assessment includes actions for improving digital wellbeing and productivity within your organization. These actions are tailored to address specific opportunities identified in the data-driven insights and pulses. Our focus is on three key areas: individual digital happiness, (hybrid) teamwork and remote habits, and leadership in a digital age. Below you can find the Transformation Actions based on the outcome of the data-driven insights and pulses: The scope and deliverables of the actions are designed to empower your organization to take tangible steps toward improving digital wellbeing and productivity. This structured approach ensures that you can address specific pain points, enhance overall workplace wellness, and ultimately achieve a more productive and healthier workforce.

Section.name: Responsibility matrix
Section.Content: This Responsibility Matrix provides the appropriate RACI tags for the Customer and Cegeka with respect to the activities for the Standard and Optional Services. Activity CEGEKA customer standard services Data-driven insights Digital wellbeing pulses Transform insights into actions OPTIONAL services N/A = Responsible: Party responsible for performing the activity and/or achieve the task. One party is Responsible, although other Parties can be delegated to assist in the actual work if required. An Accountable must sign off (approve) on work that Responsible provides. Responsible is by default proactive. = Accountable: Party ultimately accountable for the correct and thorough completion of the task and/or activity as performed by Responsible. For each task and/or activity maximum one Accountable must be specified. Accountable has the mandate to accept/dismiss on work provided by Responsible. Accountable is by default reactive. = Consulted: Party to be consulted (whose opinions are sought in two-way communication) when performing tasks and/or activities. Consulted may also provide requirements on scope, result expectations, etc. Consulted is by default reactive. = Informed: Party to be informed/kept up-to-date on tasks and/or activities (just one-way communication). Informed often only on completion of the task and/or activity. Informed no formal role in realization and therefore by default reactive.

Section.name: Service SKUs
Section.Content: Monthly SKU DESCRIPTION Unit OF MEASUREMEnt STANDARD SERVICES Data-driven reports (Bronze) 1 reports per year Per report Data-driven reports (Silver) 2 reports per year Per report Data-driven reports (Gold) 4 reports per year Per report Digital wellbeing pulses (Bronze) 1 pulses per year Per pulse Digital wellbeing pulses (Silver) 2 pulses per year Per pulse Digital wellbeing pulses (Gold) 4 pulses per year Per pulse Transformation insights into actions (Bronze) 1 action plans per year Per action plan Transformation insights into actions (Silver) 2 action plans per year Per action plan Transformation insights into actions (Gold) 4 action plans per year Per action plan OPTIONAL SERVICES N/A N/A N/A * mandatory SKU Each SKU represents a Standard or Optional service entry in the PxQ pricing overview table, where each service entry has: The total price will be recalculated to a monthly price. The Monthly Price for the Service is the sum of all the Monthly Prices for each service entry.

Section.name: Standard changes SKUs
Section.Content: Table below represents the Standard Changes for this Service, where each Standard Change Standard Change SLO (elapsed working days) Activation of Advanced insights reports 10 We require 3-4 calendar weeks for the standard changes like training and workshops due to necessary planning, customization of content, and participant readiness. This timeframe allows us to schedule trainers, customize materials, and ensure participants have sufficient time to plan and prepare for the sessions or workshops, resulting in a more effective and tailored experience. We have the possibility to activate advanced insights reports to capture data-drive insights, specifically the Ways of Working report. This report uses a template populated by Insights data to conduct a broad diagnostic of a company's collaboration patterns, meeting effectiveness, wellbeing, and coaching to uncover areas for improvement. The report is designed to help answer business questions related to understanding collaboration patterns, making meetings effective, improving wellbeing, and encouraging coaching and development. To populate the report in Power BI, the predefined Ways of Working query must be set up and successfully run. This will provide data on how much time employees spend using digital collaboration tools, how the organization spends its meeting time, whether employees are getting enough time to work on their core priorities, and whether employees are receiving sufficient manager 1:1 coaching time. The report can help identify areas for improvement and provide valuable insights into the company's ways of working.

Section.name: Non-standard changes SKUs
Section.Content: Non-standard changes NON-Standard Change Category Digital Wellbeing Governance : The employee experience platform provides abundant data, necessitating a governance workshop to determine focus areas and strategy for the digital wellbeing project. The workshop with the HR department will identify priorities, establish a review schedule, and outline procedures for collecting and utilizing data. Key questions include timing for data collection, review frequency, and initiatives based on the insights. Digital Wellbeing strategy Awareness & ability with the HR team : Once the governance is clear and recurrent reports are established, HR colleagues need to understand the reports and possible actions. Training and support for HR is crucial since they act as evangelists of the program. Their deep understanding enables them to effectively guide end users in the digital wellbeing journey. Digital Wellbeing strategy Awareness & ability – individual sessions : The initial focus on individual awareness sessions helps employees understand the importance of digital wellbeing and provides practical tips to maintain a healthy relationship with digital tools. These sessions emphasize how to use the built-in functionalities of the employee experience platform, such as setting up focus time, and ensure that employees understand where insights come from and how their privacy is guaranteed when creating reports. This foundational knowledge prepares them for more specific workshops, like the digital balance workshop, and explains the company's comprehensive digital wellbeing journey and the various workshops available for employees to follow. Onboarding & Digital Wellbeing Awareness & ability – Manager sessions : During awareness and ability sessions, team leads learn to use built-in statistics and Pulse surveys to understand team behavior and needs. They receive training and support to create surveys, ensuring employee privacy, and to take concrete actions based on survey outcomes, such as creating focus plans. These insights help team leads identify specific digital wellbeing sessions and support offered by the company. Digital Wellbeing strategy Onboarding newcomers : Many companies only run (digital) wellbeing projects for a short time and this way they don't include new employees. They are left out even though they often face a lot of stress and could use some help with digital wellbeing in their first months. By having regular training sessions for new employees, you ensure that your future workforce is resilient and feels supported from the beginning. Onboarding & Digital Wellbeing Workshop - Digital Balance sessions for the employee : While technology offers numerous advantages, it can also lead to distractions and overstimulation, making it difficult to focus. This training helps individuals manage techno-stress, overcome digital overload, and achieve a better work-life balance. With neuroscience expertise, the program provides tools to restore productivity and improve digital wellbeing. Digital Wellbeing training Workshop - Deconnect your (digital) brain: It's often difficult to disconnect from work due to constant digital stimulation, leading to stress and burnout. During the training, participants will learn about their disconnection profile and receive practical tools to manage hyperconnectivity. Hands-on techniques will be provided to practice digital, psychological, and emotional disconnection. Digital Wellbeing training Workshop - teamwork (smart meetings): Inefficient meetings often involve unnecessary participants, run too long, and result in unclear outcomes. By determining the necessity of meetings, using effective techniques, and ensuring task follow-up, meeting efficiency can be significantly improved. Addressing and improving meeting habits will align everyone and enhance overall productivity. Digital Wellbeing training Workshop - leading (hybrid) teams : Hybrid working has transformed team dynamics, emphasizing the need for leaders to foster autonomy while maintaining connectedness and clear work-life boundaries. The 'Leading hybrid teams' session equips leaders with practical techniques to adapt to this new work environment effectively. Participants will gain a hybrid framework© to enhance team collaboration and performance. Digital Wellbeing training Workshop -Leading digital wellbeing : Digital tools in the workplace can improve efficiency but also cause chaos and disconnection. Leaders should help employees manage digital stress by setting boundaries and priorities, enhancing focus and productivity. This training aims to limit techno-stress and enhance team performance through better digital well-being practices. Digital Wellbeing training Integrate third-party digital wellbeing tools or develop custom features within Microsoft 365 to address specific organizational requirements or unique user needs Digital Wellbeing Build custom reports (insights) based on the available data Digital Wellbeing Create customized digital wellbeing policies aligned with the organization's specific requirements and industry standards. This may include additional policies for privacy and stress management . This can be done on organisational level or even more specific on team level, supporting each team lead to create team working agreements and use the digital employee platform to help the team keep track of the agreements Digital Wellbeing Conduct a comprehensive review and overhaul of existing digital wellbeing policies and settings to accommodate major changes in the organization's work environment or industry regulations Digital Wellbeing We believe that the necessary recurrent awareness and communication around (digital) wellbeing is important. Therefore we can foresee communications like video (quick and fun - TikTok style) based on the insights we get from the organizational reports. Awareness and communication Recurrent aggregated report and presentation for the ( HR ) board , so the insights can be used to further develop and enhance the organizational strategy based on the companies' insights. Digital Wellbeing strategy In case the company is not offering an onboarding track for newcomers yet, we can help set it up and make sure digital tooling and digital wellbeing is integrated in the onboarding journey. Onboarding & Digital Wellbeing

Section.name: Service Window
Section.Content: Table below gives an overview of the applicable Service Windows for each Standard & Optional service Service windows description SERVICE CEGEKA Office hours 8x5: 9AM – 5PM, Monday up to and including Friday All standard & Optional services CEGEKA extended office hours 12x5: 7AM – 7PM, Monday up to and including Friday N/A cegeka 24x7 24x7 N/A

Section.name: Out of scope
Section.Content: Everything that is not included in this Service is by default out of scope.

Section.name: Cross-functional services
Section.Content: In order to guarantee the Service quality, Cegeka refers to the cross-functional Services from the contract document set and their corresponding standard KPI's.
